item.title: Interactive Grid – Update current row only
item.author: Author
item.description: In my current project I use an interactive grid on one page. When you click on a row, i. e. select it, a report is displayed below the grid that displays this data set. The editing of the data set is realized in a modal dialog. If it is closed, the report including the currently selected line in the grid should be updated.

item.title: Datepicker with multiple tagged days
item.author: Author
item.description: in one of my current Apex projects I have to show a mini calendar and mark certain days there. Unfortunately there is only the option to mark exactly one date in APEX. After a little Google research I came across the following article: http://www.spiceforms.com/blog/highlight-particular-dates-jquery-ui-datepicker
